name: Dependency Vulnerability Response
description: Automated response workflow for dependency vulnerability alerts from package managers (npm, pip, Maven, Go modules). Riggs AI assesses the vulnerability severity and whether an exploit exists, then either auto-creates a PR to bump the vulnerable dependency or blocks the CI pipeline for critical issues requiring immediate developer attention.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: GitHub
required_integrations.reason: Create pull requests for dependency version bumps and interact with repository settings

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create tracking tickets for dependency vulnerabilities that require manual intervention

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify development teams about critical dependency vulnerabilities

data.title: Dependency Vulnerability Alert
data.summary: Triggers on dependency vulnerability alerts from SCA tools or package registries

config.description: Ingests dependency vulnerability alerts from Dependabot, Snyk, npm audit, pip-audit, or OWASP Dependency-Check

data.title: AI Dependency Risk Assessment
data.summary: Riggs AI evaluates the dependency vulnerability severity and upgrade path

config.additional_instructions: Assess the dependency vulnerability: check CVE severity, whether a public exploit exists, if the vulnerable function is actually called in the codebase, and whether a patched version is available. Recommend upgrade path and breaking change risk.
config.description: AI-powered dependency vulnerability risk assessment with upgrade path analysis

data.title: Critical with Known Exploit?
data.summary: Check if the dependency vulnerability is critical and has a known exploit

data.title: Block Pipeline & Alert Team
data.summary: Block the CI/CD pipeline and immediately notify the development team

data.title: Create Emergency Fix Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for the critical dependency vulnerability

config.description: Create an emergency P1 ticket for critical exploitable dependency vulnerability

data.title: Patch Available?
data.summary: Check if a patched version of the dependency exists

data.title: Create Auto-Upgrade PR
data.summary: Automatically create a pull request to bump the vulnerable dependency

parameters.title: fix(deps): upgrade {{trigger-1.alert.package_name}} to {{trigger-1.alert.patched_version}} ({{trigger-1.alert.cve_id}})

config.description: Create a pull request to automatically upgrade the vulnerable dependency

data.title: Log for Manual Review
data.summary: No patch available — log for manual developer review

config.note: Dependency vulnerability in {{trigger-1.alert.package_name}}@{{trigger-1.alert.current_version}} — no patched version available. Requires manual workaround or alternative package.

data.title: End — Pipeline Blocked
data.summary: Critical dependency vulnerability — pipeline blocked and team notified

config.summary: Critical dependency vulnerability with public exploit. Pipeline blocked, emergency ticket created.

data.title: End — PR Created or Logged
data.summary: Non-critical dependency vulnerability handled via PR or logged for review

config.summary: Dependency vulnerability handled. Upgrade PR created or logged for manual review.
